title: TON Connect app manifest
description: Schema for `tonconnect-manifest.json`. The wallet fetches this file before showing the connect prompt and displays the metadata to the user. See `spec/manifest.md`.

url.description: App URL. Identifies the dApp and is opened by the wallet when the user taps the app icon. SHOULD NOT include a trailing slash. The host portion is extracted as `AppDomain` for `ton_proof` and `signData` signatures.

name.description: Display name of the dApp, shown to the user during the connect prompt.

iconUrl.description: HTTPS URL of the app icon. Raster image; PNG (recommended) or ICO. SVG MUST NOT be used. 180×180 px square is recommended.

termsOfUseUrl.description: Optional. HTTPS URL of the dApp's terms of use.

privacyPolicyUrl.description: Optional. HTTPS URL of the dApp's privacy policy.
